cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: The Espresso order's price is between the order with the Bagel and Edith.
Bagel, Croissant, and Danish go with Chai, Cortado, and $9, in some order.
Between Cortado and Croissant, one goes with Dane and the other with Hugo.
Either Dane goes with $11, or Greta goes with Americano — but not both.
Either Cortado goes with Dane or Ava goes with $11.
Either Chai goes with $13 or Ristretto goes with Greta.
Exactly two of these are true: Dane goes with Danish; Cortado goes with $11; Ristretto goes with Scone.
Ava's price is between the Cortado order and the order with the Tart.
Ava goes with none of Latte, Muffin, or $5.
$5 goes with at least two of Dane, Cortado, and Muffin.
$15 goes with at most one of Ava, Latte, and Muffin.
Greta's price is lower than both the Espresso order and the order with the Croissant.

kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan with the Hammer's levy is between the artisan who makes Barrels and Godfrey.

dnd.name: The Adventuring Party
dnd.description: A band of adventurers gathers at the tavern — each a different race, wielding a different weapon. Work out who's who.
clues: The adventurer with the Longsword's gold is between the Abjuration mage and Orin.
Abjuration, Divination, and Evocation go with Greataxe, Longbow, and 20 gp, in some order.
Between Longbow and Divination, one goes with Mara and the other with Wrenna.
Either Mara goes with 25 gp, or Sable goes with Dagger — but not both.
Either Longbow goes with Mara or Fenwick goes with 25 gp.
Either Greataxe goes with 30 gp or Warhammer goes with Sable.

Fenwick's gold is between the adventurer with the Longbow and the Transmutation mage.

10 gp goes with at least two of Mara, Longbow, and Illusion.
35 gp goes with at most one of Fenwick, Quarterstaff, and Illusion.

space.name: The Mars Colony
space.description: The first colonists of a new Mars settlement each took a different role and hail from a different world. Work out who's who.
clues: The Geologist's distance is between the colonist in the Aurora module and Eklund.
Aurora, Cortex, and Drift go with Captain, Engineer, and 11 ly, in some order.
Between Engineer and Cortex, one goes with Dasari and the other with Rios.
Either Dasari goes with 13 ly, or Okafor goes with Botanist — but not both.
Either Engineer goes with Dasari or Anders goes with 13 ly.
Either Captain goes with 15 ly or Technician goes with Okafor.
Exactly two of these are true: Dasari goes with Drift; Engineer goes with 13 ly; Technician goes with Helix.
Anders' distance is between the Engineer and the colonist in the Lumen module.
Anders goes with none of Medic, Forge, or 7 ly.
7 ly goes with at least two of Dasari, Engineer, and Forge.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler using the Popper's weight is between the angler fishing with Corn and Gus.
Corn, Dough, and Leech go with Crankbait, Jig, and 9 lb, in some order.
Between Jig and Dough, one goes with Esther and the other with Wade.
Either Esther goes with 11 lb, or Royce goes with Buzzbait — but not both.
Either Jig goes with Esther or Boone goes with 11 lb.
Either Crankbait goes with 13 lb or Wobbler goes with Royce.
Exactly two of these are true: Esther goes with Leech; Jig goes with 11 lb; Wobbler goes with Nightcrawler.
Boone's weight is between the angler using the Jig and the angler fishing with Shrimp.
Boone goes with none of Spinnerbait, Minnow, or 5 lb.
5 lb goes with at least two of Esther, Jig, and Minnow.
15 lb goes with at most one of Boone, Spinnerbait, and Minnow.
Royce's weight is lower than both the angler using the Popper and the angler fishing with Dough.
